checks.name: external_prez_view_safety
checks.description: ExternalPrezViewActions (viewPresentation) only permitted if principal in resource.viewers OR resource.owner == principal OR principal in resource.editors

checks.name: duplicate_presentation_safety
checks.description: duplicatePresentation only permitted if (principal.job == Job::"internal" AND principal in resource.viewers) OR resource.owner == principal OR principal in resource.editors

checks.name: edit_presentation_safety
checks.description: editPresentation only permitted if resource.owner == principal OR principal in resource.editors

checks.name: grant_view_prez_safety
checks.description: grantViewAccessToPresentation only if editor/owner AND customer sharing restriction respected

checks.name: grant_edit_prez_safety
checks.description: grantEditAccessToPresentation only if editor/owner AND target is internal

checks.name: delete_presentation_safety
checks.description: deletePresentation only permitted if resource.owner == principal

checks.name: view_template_safety
checks.description: viewTemplate only if (internal AND in viewers) OR (in viewerMarkets) OR owner OR in editors OR in editorMarkets

checks.name: edit_template_safety
checks.description: editTemplate only if owner OR in editors OR in editorMarkets

checks.name: grant_view_template_safety
checks.description: grantViewAccessToTemplate only if editor/owner/editorMarket AND customer restriction respected

checks.name: grant_edit_template_safety
checks.description: grantEditAccessToTemplate only if editor/owner/editorMarket AND targetUser (if present) is internal

checks.name: floor_owner_edit_presentation
checks.description: Owner MUST be able to edit their own presentation

checks.name: floor_viewer_view_presentation
checks.description: A viewer MUST be able to view a presentation

checks.name: floor_delete_presentation_owner
checks.description: Owner MUST be able to delete their own presentation

checks.name: floor_market_view_template
checks.description: User in viewerMarkets MUST be able to view template

checks.name: floor_owner_edit_template
checks.description: Owner MUST be able to edit their own template

results.description: ExternalPrezViewActions (viewPresentation) only permitted if principal in resource.viewers OR resource.owner == principal OR principal in resource.editors
duplicatePresentation only permitted if (principal.job == Job::"internal" AND principal in resource.viewers) OR resource.owner == principal OR principal in resource.editors
editPresentation only permitted if resource.owner == principal OR principal in resource.editors
grantViewAccessToPresentation only if editor/owner AND customer sharing restriction respected
grantEditAccessToPresentation only if editor/owner AND target is internal
deletePresentation only permitted if resource.owner == principal
viewTemplate only if (internal AND in viewers) OR (in viewerMarkets) OR owner OR in editors OR in editorMarkets
editTemplate only if owner OR in editors OR in editorMarkets
grantViewAccessToTemplate only if editor/owner/editorMarket AND customer restriction respected
grantEditAccessToTemplate only if editor/owner/editorMarket AND targetUser (if present) is internal
Owner MUST be able to edit their own presentation
A viewer MUST be able to view a presentation
Owner MUST be able to delete their own presentation
User in viewerMarkets MUST be able to view template
results.counterexample:
✗ Policy set 1 implies policy set 2: DOES NOT HOLD
  Counterexample found:
principal: User::"", action: Action::"viewTemplate", resource: Template::""
context: {}
entities: [
  Job::"internal",
  Action::"grantViewAccessToTemplate" in [Action::"TemplateEditActions"],
  Action::"InternalPrezViewActions",
  Action::"TemplateEditActions",
  Market::"",
  Job::"",
  User::"" in [Market::""] {
    customerId: "A",
    job: Job::"",
  },
  Action::"InternalTemplateViewActions",
  Action::"PrezEditActions",
  Action::"viewPresentation" in [Action::"PrezEditActions", Action::"ExternalPrezViewActions", Action::"InternalPrezViewActions"],
  Action::"duplicatePresentation" in [Action::"InternalPrezViewActions", Action::"PrezEditActions"],
  Action::"viewTemplate" in [Action::"InternalTemplateViewActions", Action::"MarketTemplateViewActions", Action::"TemplateEditActions"],
  Action::"removeSelfAccessFromPresentation" in [Action::"PrezEditActions", Action::"InternalPrezViewActions", Action::"ExternalPrezViewActions"],
  Action::"MarketTemplateViewActions",
  Action::"duplicateTemplate" in [Action::"InternalTemplateViewActions", Action::"MarketTemplateViewActions", Action::"TemplateEditActions"],
  Action::"grantViewAccessToPresentation" in [Action::"PrezEditActions"],
  Market::"A",
  Action::"editTemplate" in [Action::"TemplateEditActions"],
  Action::"removeOthersAccessToTemplate" in [Action::"TemplateEditActions"],
  Action::"grantEditAccessToPresentation" in [Action::"PrezEditActions"],
  Action::"grantEditAccessToTemplate" in [Action::"TemplateEditActions"],
  Template::"" {
    editorMarkets: [Market::"A"],
    editors: [User::""],
    owner: User::"A",
    viewerMarkets: [Market::""],
    viewers: [],
  },
  Action::"removeSelfAccessFromTemplate" in [Action::"TemplateEditActions", Action::"InternalTemplateViewActions"],
  User::"A" {
    customerId: "A",
    job: Job::"",
  },
  Action::"editPresentation" in [Action::"PrezEditActions"],
  Action::"ExternalPrezViewActions",
  Action::"deletePresentation",
]

results.description: Owner MUST be able to edit their own template
